Build Animation Timeline Metadata

Source: R/timeline-webgl.R
animation_spec.Rd

animation_spec() is a user-facing alias for ggwebgl_timeline(). It keeps one canonical timeline contract while providing a concise name for animation examples and adapter code.

Usage

animation_spec(...)

Value

A ggwebgl_timeline list.

Examples

animation_spec(frames = 1:3, autoplay = FALSE)
#> $frames
#> [1] 1 2 3
#> 
#> $values
#> [1] 1 2 3
#> 
#> $source
#> [1] "frame"
#> 
#> $loop
#> [1] TRUE
#> 
#> $autoplay
#> [1] FALSE
#> 
#> $speed
#> [1] 1
#> 
#> $controls
#> [1] TRUE
#> 
#> $filter
#> [1] "exact"
#> 
#> $mode
#> [1] "exact"
#> 
#> attr(,"class")
#> [1] "ggwebgl_timeline" "list"
